name: Spicy Szechuan Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 2- by 1/2-inch strips.
2. Place the chicken strips in a large pie plate.
3. Sprinkle 2 teaspoons cornstarch over the chicken and mix well to coat.
4. Add the egg white and mix again.
5. Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or a 12-inch frying pan.
6. Add the chicken and bamboo shoots to the hot oil and stir-fry for about 3 minutes, using a wooden spoon or wooden fork.
7. Add the chilies and peanuts; stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes.
8. Combine all remaining ingredients (sugar, soy sauce, dry sherry, grated ginger, diced green chilies, chopped green onion, and roasted peanuts) with the remaining 2 teaspoons cornstarch in a bowl.
9. Add this mixture to the wok or pan and stir-fry until the sauce is thick and smooth and the mixture is well blended.
10. Add the chopped green onions and stir-fry for an additional 30 seconds to warm them through.
11. Serve immediately.
